jcr:content.jcr:description: We are advancing environmental, social and governance (ESG) initiatives that contribute to the sustainable growth of our company so that we can create positive impact for generations to come. Our ESG framework is built around three pillars that were developed based on our six core material drivers: product innovation, human capital management, product quality and safety, business ethics, patient health and engagement, and patient access and affordability.
jcr:content.jcr:title: Environmental, Social & Governance
jcr:content.description: See how we're creating positive impact for generations to come.
jcr:content.title: Environmental, Social & Governance

text.text: We’re advancing ESG initiatives that contribute to our sustainable growth, so that we can create a positive impact for generations to come.

text_copy.text: Our leaders are stewards of our environmental, social and governance (ESG) mission, and our people are committed to ensuring our research, innovations and collaborations put impact for people, communities and our world first.

teaser_copy.jcr:description: We see our strategy as an opportunity to apply the same rigor, curiosity and focus on science-based solutions to how we sustainably maintain and grow our business.
teaser_copy.jcr:title: Our ESG strategy is built around three foundational pillars

text.text: Patients: Elevating and transforming standards of care to make a remarkable impact in patients’ lives.

text_copy.text: Our People and Culture: Developing our people and continually enhancing our strong culture so, together, we can deliver on AbbVie’s mission.
Business Sustainability: Taking steps to sustain AbbVie’s long-term growth – including managing our environmental impact.

text_copy_copy_copy.text: Our ESG Action Report details the progress we’ve made towards fulfilling our ESG commitments. Download our latest report to see what impact we made in 2025.

button.jcr:title: 2025 ESG Action Report Disclosure Supplement
button.accessibilityLabel: View 2023 ESG Action Report Disclosure Supplement

text.text: Our material ESG topics have been determined by a DMA, aligned with the standards set forth in the European Union’s Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive, evaluating both the financial impact of sustainability issues on our company and our impact on society and the environment. Our DMA was completed in 2024.
We work to consistently discover and deliver innovative medicines that address serious health issues and enhance people’s lives.

text_copy.text: We believe everyone who needs our medicines should be able to get them.

text_copy_copy.text: We are committed to delivering safe and effective products and medicines through robust quality systems.

text_copy.text: We nurture diverse talent to solve the most complex health challenges and create a remarkable impact in people’s lives.

text_copy_copy_copy_2067379012.text: We aim to reduce our environmental footprint and grow sustainability through inspiring innovation.

text_copy_copy.text: We are committed to the ethical use of personal data.

text_copy_copy_copy_.text: We act with integrity in everything we do.

text_copy_copy_copy.text: To ensure we're delivering on our commitments, we track and report our progress and continually evaluate our efforts relative to external frameworks such as the TCFD, CDP and the Sustainability Accounting Standards Board.
